title: Grant S. Boucher
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Grant S. Boucher''' is an author who wrote the [[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope|first]] [[Galaxy Guide]], as well as other ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplements.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Sources==
===Roleplaying-game sourcebooks===
*''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]'' (1989)
*''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'' (1991)
*''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' (1993)
*''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'' (1997)
